message:
🐛 Fix cluster resource tree data display and add resource types (#233)

* 🐛 Fix cluster resource tree data display and add resource types

Fix cache gate bug that blocked namespace data from displaying when
nodes data was unavailable. The tree now shows resources when any data
source loads, not just nodes.

Add 6 new resource types to the tree: ReplicaSets, StatefulSets,
DaemonSets, CronJobs, Ingresses, and NetworkPolicies with full-stack
support (Go backend, agent endpoints, frontend hooks, tree integration).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Add local agent support for all resource hooks

Add agent HTTP endpoints for services, configmaps, secrets,
serviceaccounts, jobs, HPAs, and PVCs so these resources can be
fetched via the local agent instead of requiring the REST API backend.

Update existing hooks (useJobs, useHPAs, useConfigMaps, useSecrets,
useServiceAccounts, usePVCs, useServices) to try the local agent
first before falling back to the REST API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
